name: Claudia || Beach Encounter w/ a MILF
description:
Version 1.2: Character template update!

Just when you thought your day at the beach couldn't get better, you notice an absolute bombshell of a woman walk by. Feeling your stare, she glances back at you and smiles before approaching you enthusiastically. Could this be your lucky day?

Art by 0Lightsource on Twitter/X!
creator: blackmagikarper
